strengths: Strong Power BI dashboard development with quantified impact
Proficient Python for ETL and analytics
Experience with AI tools for automation
weaknesses: No explicit Power Automate/Power Apps experience
Limited or no direct DMTS/Salesforce product experience documented
Limited long-tenure in relevant roles (~2 years total)
Salesforce CRM listed under marketing but not DMTS workflows
improvement_bullets: Streamlined invoice processing and data entry by building custom Power Automate workflows and Power Apps interfaces, reducing manual administrative tasks by 10 hours per week.
Managed departmental budget tracking and expenditure reporting by developing automated Excel-based tracking systems, ensuring 100% data integrity for monthly financial reviews.
Utilized Salesforce CRM to manage client data and program eligibility checks, ensuring high-quality compliance and accurate reporting for operational KPIs.

Developed and maintained automated reporting solutions using the Microsoft Power Platform, specifically integrating Power BI, Power Automate, and Python scripts to enhance visibility into program metrics.
Collaborated with project delivery teams to reconcile program expenditures and application documentation, utilizing rigorous quality control processes to ensure compliance with company standards.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Data Reporting Analyst (HYBRID/NO C2C) opportunity with Amerit Consulting. I am interested in this opportunity because of the critical role data plays in driving efficiency within renewable energy programs. What interests me about working for Amerit Consulting is its commitment to delivering high-impact operational solutions for Fortune 500 companies; this mission aligns with my passion for using data analytics to solve real-world problems. I believe my expertise in dashboard development and my proficiency in data automation would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems by translating complex data into actionable operational insights. In fact, while at Shine Masters Cleaning Services, I developed interactive Power BI dashboards that replaced manual reporting, which resulted in a 40% reduction in data processing time and allowed executive leadership to make more informed, data-driven decisions. Ultimately, I know that the Data Reporting Analyst role at Amerit Consulting would allow me to bring my automation skills to support the Demand Management Tracking System (DMTS). Additionally, my role as a Full-Stack Software Developer at Haven Technologies enabled me to develop my database management and quality control skills. During a critical insurance testing project, I optimized relational database queries to clean and reconcile data, improving overall data accuracy by 30% and ensuring project timelines were met. I am excited by the opportunity to use my background in Python, Power BI, and process improvement to support the accuracy and efficiency of your energy efficiency programs. I know that my technical versatility and commitment to data integrity align with what it takes to succeed at the Data Reporting Analyst role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
